summary: to control enabling/disabling both CTE's  parallel arc reduction, and the related task compression on the AAE side. Setting this variable to 'true' should yield AAE task compression mode '2'.  Setting it to 'false' will result in task compression mode '0'
description: to control enabling/disabling both CTE's  parallel arc reduction, and the related task compression on the AAE side. Setting this variable to 'true' should yield AAE task compression mode '2'.  Setting it to 'false' will result in task compression mode '0'
